item.title: Good morning!

It's hot outside. Think chilly thoughts.
No one ever expects to have extra pieces
item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: When my Sis-in-law tells me "you should come there will be puppies"
item.description:
I suffer from PTSD and the 4th me and my pup have ritual where we go into a dark room and play calming music while fireworks go off. The family every year tries to get me to go with them to a show. I respectfully decline but this year they throw out my great weakness. I'll still pass.
My lil war-vet pup (EDD) Edit: EDD stands for Explosive Detection Dog his name is Maverick
item.dc:creator: Diablero666

item.title: The scapegoat is coming for you
item.dc:creator: uglymanwithtwopeeholes

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1064 (fartsnake)
item.description:
It's morning again. Meme time. Let's get this bread.
Common ground-dove
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin is: "Beep."

item.dc:creator: ilovedogknots

item.title: A summation of my shift at the hospital last night
item.description: Rip to that one guy who blew off 1 and two half fingers. Also the lady who got shot. Also the kid who had a gaping slice right down his knee. Also the toe who was missing a body. Also the folks in assorted car accidents. Also the lady who was spurting blood from a face wound. Also the stroke-alert patients who just would not stop coming. And finally rip to my non-existent lunch break. Stay safe out there, folks.
item.dc:creator: PotatoPequeno

item.title: What the duck?
item.description: Shower seems the winner. I noticed he never tried "jet" which is probably a good thing.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Happy Birthday, Bill.
item.dc:creator: jonnyoro

item.title: After two years in bed with long COVID, Youtuber Physics Girl Dianna decided to shave off her hair
item.description:
Dianna decided to shave her head to make it easier on herself for her journey with long COVID and ME/CFS. Many people struggling with this disease choose to do this if bed-bound for extended periods of time, like Dianna has been. Hopefully she can avoid crashes, and reduce the amount of energy it takes to wash and maintain her hair every week. Millions of people are suffering from this quiet and deadly disease. https://www.youtube.com/shorts/rUEc-XehwNQ
In US, almost 18 million adult have had Long COVID. https://www.sciencealert.com/almost-18-million-adult-americans-have-had-long-covid FP edit: They are going to livestream one day of her life tomorrow (Sat 6th Jul) https://www.youtube.com/shorts/gZfg-KUPtMc
item.dc:creator: GlobalImageServiceCat

item.title: So long Tories!!
item.description: The Conservatives have faced the biggest loss in decades in the UK general election. Labour win with 410 seats verses Tory just 119.

item.title: Meet the Artist
item.description: This meet the Artist thing is very deviantart coded I’ve been posting my artwork online since I was 10, it’s cool to do one of these and then look back on all my old art. If you’re curious, my deviantart was mianekocat - Extra https://www.patreon.com/miaormoa Dono and commissions: https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/miaormoa
item.dc:creator: miaormoa
